name: world-cup-picks-report
description: Generate Harbor-backed FIFA World Cup scoreline reports from expert picks, model probabilities, market consensus, Elo ratings, lineup checks, and knockout penalty-risk analysis.

interface.shortDescription: Generate evaluated World Cup scoreline reports.
interface.longDescription: Creates timezone-aware World Cup picks reports using expert scorelines, model probabilities, betting-market consensus, Elo ratings, lineup checks, and knockout penalty-risk analysis. The skill is maintained with Harbor-backed regression evals and published eval history.
defaultPrompt: Use World Cup Picks Report for today's World Cup scoreline picks.
Generate the next World Cup knockout round picks report.
